timeframe.expansion_reason: Strict 72h window yielded 5 verified items (above the ≤5 threshold); no expansion needed.

published_items.title: Anthropic acquires Stainless, winds down public SDK generator for external customers
key_facts: Stainless powered every official Anthropic SDK
Customers included OpenAI, Google, Cloudflare, Meta (~200 orgs total)
Public hosted service winding down for external customers
September 1 2026 wind-down date per multiple secondary sources
Price not disclosed; reported as >$300M by T3 outlets

published_items.title: Google Gemini 3.5 Flash available in API; Gemini Omni and Gemini Spark announced
key_facts: Available via Gemini API, AI Studio, Gemini app, Antigravity as of May 19
Pricing: $1.50/$9 per 1M tokens (Artificial Analysis, OpenRouter - not in Google primary)
Artificial Analysis: 214 tokens/s output speed (#2 ranked), 18.55s TTFT (high vs 2.69s median)
Google benchmarks: 76.2% Terminal-Bench 2.1, 1656 GDPval-AA Elo, 83.6% MCP Atlas
3x more expensive than Gemini 3 Flash Preview (Simon Willison)
Gemini 3.5 Pro: internal testing, external rollout June 2026
Gemini Omni: available in Gemini app/Flow; developer APIs rolling out in coming weeks
Gemini Spark: beta for AI Ultra subscribers US next week

published_items.title: Google Antigravity 2.0 launches as standalone agent platform; WebMCP enters Chrome 149 origin trial
key_facts: Antigravity 2.0 globally available May 19
Components: CLI, SDK (self-managed infra), Managed Agents API, Enterprise Agent Platform
Managed Agents: single API call provisions sandboxed agent with files + tools
Workspace + third-party tool integrations included
WebMCP: proposed open web standard for browser-based AI agent tool calls
WebMCP origin trial starts in Chrome 149
Enterprise pricing/SLA not disclosed at launch

published_items.title: KPMG and Anthropic sign global alliance, embedding Claude across 276,000 employees in 138 countries
key_facts: 276,000 KPMG employees in 138 countries get Claude access
Claude Cowork + Managed Agents embedded in Digital Gateway (Azure-based)
Claude Code integrated in KPMG Blaze for PE IT modernization
KPMG named Anthropic preferred partner for PE deployments
No financial terms disclosed
Tax compliance agent: minutes vs. weeks (vendor-claimed; no independent measure)
published_items.conflict_of_interest: Both KPMG and Anthropic issued statements; vendor-side claims throughout

published_items.title: Andrej Karpathy joins Anthropic's pre-training team
key_facts: Joining Anthropic pre-training team, starting week of May 19
Focus: launching team to use Claude to accelerate pretraining research
Background: founding OpenAI member, Tesla Autopilot AI director, Eureka Labs founder
Anthropic primary had not posted by run time; confirmed by Axios, TechCrunch, CNBC
